reader_description: Show and edit tags on the reader
tagging_description: Batch write RFID tags from barcodes
tag_not_on_whitelist_text: This tag does not match the configured whitelist. Check your prefixes or enable the override below to proceed.
initialize_tag_text: Scan a barcode or type it and press Enter to initialize the tag
scan_barcode_or: Scan barcode or enter it manually
confirm_clear: Are you sure you want to clear all data from this tag?
confirm_kill: Are you sure you want to permanently kill this tag? This action cannot be undone!
no_items_detected_text: Place items on the RFID reader and click "Reload Items"
please_return_to_desk_text: One or more items need to be processed
lms_test_console_text: Use the currently configured LMS endpoints directly from the admin area.
borrow_description: Place your items on the reader to borrow them
return_description: Place your items on the reader to return them
list_description: View status of books on the device
account_description: Current status of your library account
please_sign_in: Please sign in to view your account details
place_items_on_the_reader_to_begin: Place items on the reader to begin
no_items_processed: No items were processed in this session
username_password_description: Enter your username and password to continue.
password_only_description: Scan your ID or enter your username, then press Enter to continue.'
focused_for_text: Focused for barcode scanners; press Enter to submit.
point_the_camera: Point the camera at a QR code or barcode.
tagging_crew_message: Scan the next book using the barcode scanner
unable_to_load_media_information: Unable to load book data. Please try again.
an_error_occurred_please_try_again: An error occurred. Please try again.
reader_configuration_missing_message: Reader configuration is missing. Add middleware_id and reader_id to the URL.
checkout_profile_missing_message: Checkout profile is missing. Add checkout_profile_id to the URL.
checkout_profile_not_found_message: Checkout profile "{checkoutProfileId}" not found in config.
item_not_found_in_lms_message: Item not found in library system
error_no_checkout_profile: No checkout profile configured; provide library and circ_desk values
error_multiple_checkout_profiles: Multiple checkout profiles configured; specify checkout_profile_id or provide library and circ_desk
error_no_user_logged_in: No user is currently logged in
error_item_not_found_for_barcode: Item not found for the given barcode
error_invalid_return_data: Invalid item data format after return
secure_failure_message: Failed to unsecure item after borrow
no_reader_found_message: No reader configured. Add middleware_id and reader_id to the URL.
no_reader_found_while_borrowing_message: No reader configured. Add middleware_id and reader_id to the URL before borrowing.
no_reader_found_while_listing_message: No reader configured. Add middleware_id and reader_id to the URL before viewing device items
no_reader_found_while_monitoring_message: No reader configured. Add middleware_id and reader_id to the URL before monitoring the gate.
no_reader_selected_message: No reader selected. Please select a reader from the top menu
no_tag_detected_message: No tag detected. Please place a tag on the reader.
multiple_tags_detected_message: Mehrere Tags erfasst. Bitte stellen Sie sicher, dass sich nur ein Tag auf dem Lesegerät befindet.
enable_override_message: Tag is not on the whitelist. Enable override to proceed.
tag_initialization_failure_message: Failed to initialize tag. Please try again.
